budget_or_use_of_funds.rationale: Convert local infrastructure into public-safe docs and examples.
Prepare reproducible local-only examples and test harnesses.
Keep gate templates and docs current for one round cycle.

deliverables: Open a read-only architecture report describing the lane/agent/task/artifact/outcome/trace/service-request model.
Publish local-only safety-gate templates for account, KYC, wallet, marketplace, bounty, and trading workflows after explicit approval.
Package reproducible fixture/checker examples for prediction markets, bounty programs, grants, and digital products using synthetic or saved public rows.
Document integrity checks for service-worker chain, egress chain, coverage, and artifact traceability.
problem_statement: Small builders need safe, auditable agent-company infrastructure for discovering online revenue paths without accidental account, payment, wallet, public-post, or security-testing side effects.
public_promotion_plan_local_only: Draft only; no public campaign, contribution solicitation, donor coordination, or quid pro quo.
roadmap: Week 1: extract sanitized architecture docs and fixture schemas from the local lab.
Week 2: prepare grant-safe public repo/docs with no private credentials, no paid opportunity targets, and no platform-sensitive data.
Week 3: add examples and acceptance tests for local-only gates.
Week 4: publish impact report and maintenance plan if approved.
